segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hi, I received a parking ticket at the Smith Street parking garage yesterday. It said I was parked in an area reserved for faculty. Were you parked on the 1st level? Yes, but I've been parking there for months now. I thought it was a student area. It was, but we changed it last week. There are signs posted outside the garage. Oh, honestly, I probably wasn't paying attention anyway. Can I go ahead and pay it now?
